theme_archetype.description: A high-end, editorial-first luxury streetwear aesthetic (Off-White/Dior inspired) applied to a curated marketplace of clever everyday gadgets. The contrast between mundane/quirky products and ultra-premium presentation is the core identity.

rules: Never center-align headings by default. Embrace aggressive left or right alignment to create tension.
Use Bodoni Moda for all display headings to create the Dior/editorial feel.
Use Outfit for all UI elements, buttons, and dense descriptions for Apple-like clarity.
Overlines and labels must be uppercase Outfit with massive tracking (tracking-[0.2em]).
Absolute monochrome discipline. Color exists only to guide action. 95% of UI is black, white, and gray.
No gradients. Flat colors and high contrast.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing. p-12, p-16, p-24, p-32 to create breathing room.

rules: Use 1px borders everywhere to expose the grid (border-collapse look).
Asymmetry is key. Use col-span-8 and col-span-4 to avoid boring 50/50 splits.
Images must not fill 100% of their containers—leave padding (e.g., p-8) inside bordered containers.

layout_and_spacing.borders: 1px crisp borders. Zero border-radius (rounded-none). Sharp edges signify high-end luxury streetwear.

buttons.primary: Solid background, contrasting text, zero border-radius, uppercase tracked text. Hover: slight scale down or inverse colors.
buttons.secondary: Transparent background, 1px border, contrasting text. Hover: fill background.

cards.product_card: No visible card background. Just the image, 1px bottom border for separation, and stark minimal typography below. Image container can have a subtle border.
cards.hover_effect: Images should have a subtle scale (scale-105) or reveal a secondary image on hover.

navigation.header: Sticky glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80) with a sharp 1px bottom border. Massive logo on the left, minimal links in the center, cart/menu on the right.

forms_and_filters.style: Minimalist inputs with border-b only (no full box). Floating labels or stark placeholders.

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Subtle fade-in and slight Y-axis translation (Framer Motion).
motion_and_interactions.scroll_reveal: Images and typography block reveal on scroll.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Magnetic buttons, smooth image parallax on scroll.

icons.style: Thin or Light weight. Very minimal and sharp.

Home.Hero: Full bleed section with a central massive image or editorial collage. Headline: 'MALIN' in massive Bodoni Moda. Slogan: 'SMART EVERYDAY.' CTA: 'Shop Now'.
Home.Collections: Tetris grid layout featuring collections (Maison, Tech, Habillement). Sharp borders, overlapping text.
Home.Best Sellers: 4-column grid of product cards with sharp edges and lots of negative space.
Home.Brand Story: Editorial layout. Large quote on one side, small dense text block on the other.
Home.Footer: Massive 'MALIN' text (text-[15vw]). Minimal links. Stark contrast.

Shop.Layout: Sidebar for filters (Price, Category, New). Right side: 3-column product grid.
Shop.Filters: Accordion style or simple sticky list with stark checkboxes.

Product.Layout: Left side: Asymmetric masonry image gallery. Right side: Sticky product info, price, description, 'Add to Cart' button (massive, full width).
Product.Similar: Bottom section, single row scrollable carousel.

Cart.Layout: Slide-over drawer or dedicated minimal page. High contrast checkout button.

hero.description: Stylish woman in cropped hoodie, urban setting (Hero main image)
Black laptop computer on white table (Tech/Gadget hero)

products.description: Sharp kitchen knife with dark handle (Kitchen / Smart gadget)
VR headset and smartwatch (Smart Home / Tech)
Stylish woman in urban street (Streetwear apparel)

testing.instructions: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, toggles, cart icons) MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Framer Motion for fade-ins and scroll reveal effects.
Implement context API for the cart state.
Create a toggle for Dark/Light mode, adhering strictly to the monochromatic color palette provided.
Ensure the fonts (Bodoni Moda and Outfit) are imported via Google Fonts in index.html or global css.
Stick strictly to Tailwind. Avoid pre-built Shadcn components for the marketing/layout parts; build custom pure HTML+Tailwind for the editorial look.
No border-radius anywhere (rounded-none). The aesthetic must be sharp, stark, and brutalist luxury.
Use the provided image URLs as placeholders.
